parts.description: Pure, UI-free numeric core: value model, ops, parsing, expression evaluator, fixed-point. Carries all 35 unit tests.
eframe/egui immediate-mode desktop app over powercalc-core. Glow (OpenGL) backend; x11 + wayland; persistence for theme/history-base.

integration_points.details: powercalc-core = { path = "../core" }; app.rs calls eval, fixed::to_real/from_real, Value methods. One-way dependency.
